title: Capesize Rates Weaken Despite Solid Export Volumes
section_path: Capesize Rates Weaken Despite Solid Export Volumes
section_path_text: Capesize Rates Weaken Despite Solid Export Volumes
summary:
Main
The Capesize market continued its descent today, with average spot rates dropping to the mid-15,000 range and with all shipping routes posting losses. The downward trend that begun in early August remains in place for the large dry bulk ships, although volatility has been subdued during that period, something of an anomaly for the highly volatile Capesize market. Despite the weakening trend in spot rates, iron ore exports remain strong from both Brazil and Australia, the two main exporting regions.
